# SPM Spec — Finalise all non-CEC courses

*Generated by `/CARSI:spm` 2026-07-11. Read-only analysis; no code changed. Evidence = the
`data/seed/courses-catalog.json` on `origin/main` + repo schema/subsystems.*

## 1. Task being planned
- **Original request:** "full walkthrough all the non iicrc-cec courses one last time and /spm find any additional missing elements and training enhancements to finalise all courses."
- **Interpreted task:** Audit every CARSI-original (non-CEC) course, quantify what's missing/inconsistent, and produce a build-ready plan to finalise them to a uniform release bar.
- **Target outcome:** A decision-grade spec with a per-course/per-series gap inventory + an ordered finalisation programme.
- **Non-build clarification:** This is planning only. Implementation follows via `/execute-goal`.

## 2. Current project context
- **Repo/branch:** CARSI, `main` (analysed against `origin/main` tip).
- **Working tree:** clean for this analysis (read-only).
- **Finding:** **All 37 catalogue courses are non-CEC** — `cecHours: 0`/null and `iicrcDiscipline: null` across the board. This is correct and expected: CARSI builds its own Southern-Hemisphere designations and cannot show CEC hours without founder-confirmed IICRC approval (memory: `carsi-designations-not-iicrc`, `carsi-cec-requires-iicrc-approval`). So "non-CEC courses" = **the entire catalogue**.
- **Relevant systems:** LMS course catalogue (`data/seed/courses-catalog.json`); a full **practical-assessments + quiz subsystem** (`app/(admin)/admin/practical-assessments/*`, `app/api/lms/practical-assessments/*`, `dashboard/courses/[slug]/quiz/[quizId]`); assessment drafts (`data/seed/assessment-drafts/*.quizzes.json` — WHS pioneered this); the AU-English + IICRC terminology guards (CI); the CCW media manifest + Synthex media bridge (`data/media/`, Synthex `scripts/generate-course-media.mjs`).
- **Known behaviour:** publish state lives in the prod DB (admin panel via founder Chrome), not derivable from the catalogue (`isPublished` is null in the export).
- **Unknowns:** which courses are live vs draft on prod; whether the 4 empty quiz lessons are intended placeholders.

## 3. Problem statement
- **User:** CARSI students (learners) + the founder (owner/instructor) + prospects browsing the catalogue.
- **Pain:** The catalogue is uneven — most courses lack a knowledge check, ~half lack a card thumbnail, none have an intro video, and ~20 lack the metadata that powers browse/filter/SEO. A learner finishing a course with no assessment gets no completion signal; a prospect sees inconsistent cards.
- **Current workaround:** Courses ship as-is; assessments/media added ad hoc (only WHS + 6 others have quizzes).
- **Business impact:** Inconsistent perceived quality; weaker completion/《certificate》 story; weaker SEO/discovery; the media pipeline (just built for CCW) is unused by 36 courses.
- **Technical impact:** Quiz subsystem exists but is wired to only 7/37 courses; media manifest pattern exists but covers 1 course.
- **Why now:** The founder wants the catalogue finalised to a uniform release bar "one last time."

## 4. Desired outcome
- **User-facing:** Every course carries — a thumbnail, an intro video, complete card metadata, consistent pedagogical scaffolds (objectives → nuggets → take-aways), and a real end-of-course assessment.
- **Internal:** One documented "course completeness bar" + a repeatable harness that scores every course against it, wired into CI so no course regresses below the bar.
- **Success looks like:** `check:course-completeness` passes for all 37; 0 assessment gaps; 0 missing thumbnails; media manifest covers all courses; guards green.
- **Must not happen:** No fabricated CEC hours; no IICRC-certification implication; no US content; no invented completion claims; no prod publish without the founder.

## 5. Scope
### In scope
- A **course-completeness harness** (a guard script + documented bar) scoring: assessment present, thumbnail, intro-video reference, card metadata (durationHours/level/category/shortDescription/tags), scaffold markers, AU/IICRC compliance.
- **Gap remediation** across all 37 courses, in series batches.
- Extending the **CCW media manifest pattern** to every course (thumbnails + intro videos).
- Retiring/merging the one stub.
### Out of scope
- Awarding CEC hours (needs IICRC approval — separate, founder-gated).
- Prod publish/unpublish (founder Chrome only).
- Net-new courses beyond finalising existing 37.
- The IICRC-CEC compliance programme (separate spec).
### Explicit non-goals
- No change to designation model (iicrcDiscipline stays null).
- No live media `--execute` run inside this spec (founder-gated on Synthex auth token).
### Assumptions
- The quiz subsystem (`contentType: "quiz"` lessons + practical-assessments) is the assessment mechanism.
- The `assessment-drafts/*.quizzes.json` + WHS pattern is the seed format.
### Constraints
- AU-produced; IICRC-CEC terminology; no COACH8; guards must pass; no prod DDL/publish; estate merge-gate.

## 6. Existing capability review
| Capability | Location/source | Reusable? | Notes |
|---|---|---:|---|
| Quiz/assessment subsystem | `app/api/lms/practical-assessments/*`, `dashboard/courses/[slug]/quiz/[quizId]` | Yes | Wired to 7/37 courses today |
| Assessment draft format | `data/seed/assessment-drafts/whs-*.quizzes.json` | Yes | WHS pioneered; template for the other 30 |
| CCW quizzes (authored) | `docs/course-content/ccw-workshop/*` (5 quizzes + key) | Yes | Ready to seed CCW/floor courses |
| Media manifest + bridge | `data/media/ccw-workshop-media-manifest.json`, Synthex `generate-course-media.mjs` | Yes | Extend per course for thumbnails + intro videos |
| AU-English guard | `scripts/check-au-english.mjs` (+ CI) | Yes | Already scans catalogue JSON |
| IICRC terminology guard | `scripts/check-iicrc-terminology.mjs` (+ CI) | Yes | Scans `data/seed/` JSON |
| Course thumbnail fallback | `CourseTextThumbnail` component | Yes | Data-driven card when no image |

## 7. Specialist board review
| Role | Finding | Risk | Recommendation |
|---|---|---|---|
| Senior PM | 30/37 courses have no assessment — the highest-value, most-visible gap | Med | Prioritise assessments; batch by series |
| Software Architect | Reuse quiz subsystem + media bridge; add a completeness guard, don't build new LMS surface | Low | Harness + data, not new systems |
| UX/UI | 15 missing thumbnails + 0 intro videos + ~20 thin cards = inconsistent browse | Med | Media manifest for all; fill card metadata |
| Security | Content/data only; no auth/PII/secrets; prod publish stays founder-gated | Low | Keep `--execute`/publish founder-gated |
| QA/Test Lead | No objective "done" bar exists per course | Med | Ship `check:course-completeness` first (defines done) |
| Devil's Advocate | 37 courses × 6 gap classes is large — don't boil the ocean | High | Build harness + pilot ONE series, then roll |

## 8. Judge challenge
| Category | Score | Notes |
|---|---:|---|
| First-source evidence | 25/25 | All numbers from the catalogue JSON on origin/main |
| Clear user/business problem | 19/20 | Concrete, quantified gaps |
| Reuse of existing capability | 15/15 | Quiz subsystem + media bridge + guards all reused |
| Security/privacy safety | 15/15 | Content-only; founder gates preserved |
| UX clarity | 9/10 | Bar is clear; per-course judgement remains |
| Testability | 9/10 | Completeness guard makes "done" objective |
| Cost/control simplicity | 4/5 | Large surface; mitigated by harness-first + series batches |

**Total: 96/100 → APPROVE BUILD**, sequenced: build the completeness harness first (defines "done"), pilot one series, then roll the rest.

## 9. Proposed solution (smallest safe first)
- **Step A — Completeness harness (defines "done").** `scripts/check-course-completeness.mjs` scores each course against the bar (assessment ≥1 real quiz; thumbnail; intro-video ref; durationHours/level/category/shortDescription/tags; scaffold markers: objectives + ≥1 nugget + take-aways; AU/IICRC clean). Emits a per-course report + a summary; non-zero exit only on a configurable "release set". Wire into CI advisory-first.
- **Step B — Pilot series.** Take the **CARSI Practitioner series** (12 courses, all missing thumbnails + mostly no quizzes) OR the **Air/IAQ series** (11, no quizzes) as the pilot: author assessments (seed from CCW/WHS pattern), add media manifest entries, fill metadata + scaffolds. Prove the harness + workflow end-to-end.
- **Step C — Roll remaining series** (Drying-sites 5, Intro one-offs 5, Floor/CCW 3, plus WHS/avian/other).
- **Step D — Retire the stub** `wrt-water-damage-essentials` (324c) → merge/redirect into `water-damage-restoration-fundamentals`; deepen `floor-care-onboarding`.
- **System flow:** author quiz JSON → seed as `contentType:"quiz"` lessons/practical-assessment → add media manifest entry → generate via Synthex bridge (founder-triggered) → embed thumbnail/introVideo → harness scores green.
- **Rollback:** all changes are catalogue/data + docs on branches; revert per PR. No prod publish inside the programme.

## 10. UX requirements
- Entry: LMS catalogue cards + course pages. Every card shows a real/derived thumbnail; every course page an intro video + objectives + assessment.
- Empty/thin states: no course card should render without shortDescription + level + duration.
- Confidence signals: consistent scaffolds (objectives, nuggets, take-aways, quiz) across the catalogue.
- Accessibility: existing contrast bar already met on public pages (memory: `carsi-contrast-a11y-sweep`).

## 11. Technical requirements
- Files: `data/seed/courses-catalog.json` (metadata, quiz lessons, thumbnails/introVideo refs); `data/seed/assessment-drafts/*.quizzes.json` (new per course); `data/media/*-media-manifest.json` (extend); new `scripts/check-course-completeness.mjs` + `package.json` + `.github/workflows/ci.yml` step.
- Schema: course has `durationHours/level/category/tags/thumbnailUrl/shortDescription/isPublished`; lesson has `contentType` (`text`|`quiz`) + `resources`. `introVideoUrl` exists in the admin service layer (confirm catalogue carries it or add).
- Backward compat: additive only; no breaking schema change.
- Observability: harness report artifact per CI run.

## 12. Security & privacy
- Content/data only; no auth/PII/secrets. Live media generation + prod publish remain founder-gated. Guards enforce terminology/AU compliance.

## 13. Verification plan
### Static
```bash
node scripts/check-course-completeness.mjs            # new — per-course report
node scripts/check-au-english.mjs                     # expect ✓
node scripts/check-iicrc-terminology.mjs              # expect ✓
node -e "JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('data/seed/courses-catalog.json','utf8'))"
```
### Unit/integration
- Quiz lessons render on `dashboard/courses/[slug]/quiz/[quizId]`; practical-assessment submission path exercised for ≥1 seeded course.
### Manual review
- Founder spot-checks 2 courses per series for accuracy + AU production.
### Evidence before done
- Harness summary: 0 gaps across the release set; guards green; CI green.

## 14. Loop & stress testing
- Normal: a fully-populated course scores green. Empty: the stub scores red until retired. Malformed: invalid quiz JSON fails the harness. Duplicate: stub-vs-fundamentals de-dupe. Regression: harness in CI blocks any new course below bar. Human checkpoint: founder review per series.

## 15. Acceptance criteria
- [ ] `scripts/check-course-completeness.mjs` exists and scores all 37 courses against the documented bar.
- [ ] Every course in the release set has ≥1 real (non-empty) assessment.
- [ ] 0 courses missing `thumbnailUrl` in the release set (real or `CourseTextThumbnail`-derived).
- [ ] Every course has `durationHours`, `level`, `category`, `shortDescription`, non-empty `tags`.
- [ ] A media-manifest entry (thumbnail + intro video) exists for every course.
- [ ] The stub `wrt-water-damage-essentials` is retired/merged.
- [ ] `check:au-english` + `check:iicrc-terminology` pass for all 37.
- [ ] The 4 empty quiz-lesson placeholders are filled or removed.

## 16. Goal command
```text
/execute-goal Implement the accepted SPM spec docs/specs/2026-07-11-non-cec-course-finalisation.md. Build order: (1) scripts/check-course-completeness.mjs + CI step (advisory) defining the bar; (2) pilot the CARSI Practitioner series — author assessments (seed from WHS/CCW pattern), extend the media manifest, fill card metadata + scaffolds; (3) retire the wrt-water-damage-essentials stub. Completion: harness reports 0 gaps for the pilot series; check:au-english + check:iicrc-terminology pass; CI green; PRs opened per series. Required proof: harness output, guard output, PR links, dry-run of the media manifest via the Synthex bridge. Constraints: no CEC hours; no IICRC-cert implication; no US content; no prod publish/DDL; no live media --execute (founder-gated); no unrelated files; stop and /session-handoff if blocked on prod access or founder decisions.
```

## 17. Implementation sequence
1. **Inspect** — objective: confirm bar fields. Files: catalogue + schema. Check: JSON valid. Stop if schema differs.
2. **Harness** — objective: `check-course-completeness.mjs` + CI advisory. Check: runs on all 37. Stop if false-positives.
3. **Pilot series** — objective: one series to green. Files: catalogue, assessment-drafts, media manifest. Check: harness green for series + guards. Stop on accuracy doubt → founder.
4. **Stress** — malformed/empty/duplicate cases. 
5. **Judge** — re-score each pilot course against the bar.
6. **Handoff** — per-series `/session-handoff`.

## 18. Session-handoff seed
Planned: finalise 37 non-CEC courses to a uniform bar via a completeness harness + series batches. Key files: `scripts/check-course-completeness.mjs`, `data/seed/courses-catalog.json`, `data/seed/assessment-drafts/*`, `data/media/*-media-manifest.json`. Expected verification: harness + guards green, CI green. Deferred risks: prod publish (founder), CEC hours (IICRC), live media gen (founder token). Pickup: build the harness first, pilot the Practitioner series.

## 19. Final recommendation
**Proceed to implementation — harness-first, then pilot one series.** Score 96/100 APPROVE BUILD, sequenced to avoid boiling the ocean.

SPM spec complete. Next safe action: build `scripts/check-course-completeness.mjs` (the "done" bar), then pilot the Practitioner series.
